title: corybas ledermannii
intro: Corybas ledermannii, also known as the 'Borneo Slipper Orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corybas ledermannii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
